summary: Comprehensive testing of On-Site Review System (replacing Trustpilot). All review features tested successfully - public reviews page, homepage reviews section, admin reviews management, and all API endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: Public reviews page at /reviews correctly displays avg rating (4.5), rating distribution, and paginated reviews
Homepage reviews section shows dynamic avg rating (4.7/5) with 'View All Reviews' link to /reviews - NO Trustpilot link
Navbar has 'Reviews' link with star icon pointing to /reviews
Admin reviews page at /panelgsnadminbackend/reviews has stats cards (Total/Pending/Approved/From Customers), filter tabs (all/pending/approved/rejected/customer), and Add Manual Review button
Backend properly handles legacy reviews without 'status' field using {'$in': ['approved', None]} query
Rating validation enforced: 1-5 range (422 error for invalid)
Customer review endpoints require authentication (401/403 returned for unauthenticated requests)
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing 33 reviews in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: On-Site Review System fully tested. All features working: (1) Public /reviews page with stats, pagination, and review cards, (2) Homepage reviews section with dynamic avg rating and 'View All Reviews' link (Trustpilot removed), (3) Navbar 'Reviews' link, (4) Admin reviews management with filter tabs and approval workflow, (5) All 14 backend API tests passing. Customer review submission/update requires logged-in customer with completed order.

features_tested.GET /api/reviews: PASS - Returns max 20 approved reviews for homepage
features_tested.GET /api/reviews/public: PASS - Paginated reviews with stats (avg_rating, distribution, total, pages)
features_tested.GET /api/reviews/admin: PASS - All reviews including pending (requires admin auth)
features_tested.Rating validation: PASS - Rejects ratings outside 1-5 range (422 error)
features_tested.Homepage reviews section: PASS - Shows dynamic avg rating, 'View All Reviews' button links to /reviews
features_tested.Navbar Reviews link: PASS - Present with star icon, links to /reviews
features_tested.Public /reviews page: PASS - Displays stats, rating distribution, reviews list, pagination
features_tested.Admin reviews page: PASS - Stats cards, filter tabs, Add Manual Review, approval buttons
